subject: refactor(map): centralize marker styling constants and fix cross-platform inconsistencies
body:
Extract all map marker magic numbers (sizes, colors, strokes, typography)
into src/constants/mapMarkers.ts — single source of truth shared across
FuelMap, FuelMapWeb, and StationMarker. Fixes native search dot using
hardcoded #ffffff border instead of theme primaryContent. Improves
cluster/station visual hierarchy (radius gap 20 vs 16, font gap 13 vs 11).

Tags: map, ui, refactor, consistency
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: map
Semver: patch
